ntff.limits: limited to the benchmarked short-dipole directivity case; other sources and geometries need separate validation

dft_plane.limits: experimental; runs on the graded path without a general RF-accuracy statement

tfsf.limits: experimental for normal +/-x incidence only; oblique and +/-z incidence hard_fail

waveguide_port.limits: experimental single-mode normalize=True or normalize='flux'; a passed Palace magnitude comparison covers normalize='flux', graded-dy ratio 2, WR-90 empty/PEC-short/dielectric-slab cases, and 8.2--12.4 GHz; other profiles, bands, phase, modes, and junctions are unvalidated; eps_override and sigma_override AD are available only for normalize='flux', but only eps_override has a nonuniform AD-vs-FD regression test

lumped_rlc.limits: limited to the field update; no nonuniform S-parameter or component-value AD result

msl_s_matrix.limits: experimental for mode='laplace'/'uniform' with internal settled-S11 coverage only; mode='eigenmode' hard_fail

pec_volume_scatterer.limits: experimental: device/reference handling is regression-tested, but arbitrary iris, post, septum, branch, and T-junction RF results are not validated

limits: requires exactly one registered coaxial port with face='top' and no mixed port family
not a general multi-port coaxial network solver
requires mode='3d', solver='yee', precision='float32', stencil_order=2, and a uniform grid
requires positive CPML on both z faces, cpml_axes='z', CPML tokens on all six BoundarySpec faces, and no periodic boundary axes
constructs its own line, source, DFT planes, and termination; separate geometry, RLC elements, monitors, and termination helpers are unsupported
derives the axial layout internally; the port z position, pin_length, and impedance do not set layout or loads; use feed_impedance= and use dut_impedance= only with termination='matched'
requires an integer probe_count of at least three and enough z-domain length for every requested probe plane
use only the termination, frequency, impedance, and mesh ranges in docs/guides/sparameter_support_matrix.json
